programme.desc: La relación entre Dania y Jey sigue en problemas mientras que Brenda comienza su campaña para irse a los golpes con Rocío. Dania y Anahí por fin tienen su iniciación.

programme.title: Acapulco shore
programme.desc: Llega el día de la última fiesta en la casa y el desmadre comienza. La boss le entrega una carta a Jawy de Mane y la nostalgia lo invade.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Unas nuevas vacaciones comienza para los de Shore y en esta ocasión Mazatlán será testigo de las fiestas, amores, desamores y peleas de la familia más disfuncional de la televisión.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Nacha y Mane se enfrentan a Dania al ver que le tira sus cosas al agua. Los mariscos llegan para la cruda y la ida a un bar termina en una fiesta en la casa. Mane molesta a Dania y un nuevo enfrentamiento entre ellas comienza a gestarse.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Una nueva integrante llega a la casa. La boss anuncia que tienen que trabajar para ser parte del carnaval. El team tendo insiste en que Jey se lleve a la cama a Nacha y un bar es el sitio de encuentros y desencuentros de la familia.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Tadeo recibe una sorpresa y los shore se conmueven con su reacción. La celebración del cumpleaños de Xavier comienza. Chile y Jey tienen problemas de erección y Jawy reta a Chile a un duelo de boxeo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La espera termina y Jey por fin logra cumplirle a Nacha. Celia manda a un grupo a trabajar al acuario. La celebración de Xavier continua y las comadres se escapan del antro, lo que hace que Mane y Jawy terminen peleando.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jawy y Mane continúan. Xavi decide invitar a Pepe para que se quede en la casa. Los Shore comienzan a dudar de Fernanda. Karime busca al notario para que valide su virginidad y Mane y Fernanda terminan en un fuerte enfrentamiento.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Mane y Fernanda se van a los golpes. El conclave decide hacerle un examen a Fernanda para evitar su expulsión. Un partido de fútbol entre los Shore y los Big hippo decidirá el futuro de la casa y Pepe recibe una propuesta de amor eterno.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El examen termina y Fernanda se mantiene en la casa. Chile escucha el plan de las rechazadas y las delata. Una maestra de baile pone en su lugar a Mane y a Karime. En un restaurante se desata una batalla campal.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Después de enfrentar a Mane, Dania toma una decisión importante. Los Shore reciben una clase de banda donde nace oficialmente el corrido del “Verga muerta”. Jawy habla con Fernanda y Mane está decidida a dejar sola en la casa a Dania.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Xavier y Pepe se enfrentan nuevamente. Un grupo de brujas llega a la casa y no todos quedan contentos con sus premoniciones. En la noche de noche de chicas, Dania le pide una disculpa a Mane y su reacción deja a varios sin palabras.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shore se preguntan sobre el paradero de Dania. Chile y Diana tienen una cita romántica. Karime y Mane terminan en el hospital. Pepe y Ramiro reciben una llamada que cambia sus planes y los Shore se alistan para el carnaval.

programme.desc: As children they were forced into a religious sect that sexually abused them & controlled their lives. Now, 30 years after an intense police raid shut down "The Zion Society", some of its victims gather for the first time to share stories of survival.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brittany claims dad Charlie is scammed by his online fiancée "Stephanie" & her roommate "Carina." Charlie has given over $25K while "Stephanie" maintains a $4.5 million inheritance is coming. The investigation starts in Los Angeles and ends in Denmark!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: At age 45, Jeff moved back into his childhood bedroom in his mother's home & has reverted to a high schooler, for 16 years. Jeff's daughter, Tori, says her dad is a terrible father, an immature coward. Jeff comes face-to-face with his fed-up family.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 2011, Ashlee's husband, Emmett, was having an affair with co-worker Kandi, when he was shot & killed by Kandi's husband, Rob. The story rocked their small Idaho town & left two families forever changed. Ashlee & Kandi come face- to-face on stage.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Rodney Reed was convicted in 1996 of the rape of murder of Stacey Stites, 19, and on death row, is just weeks away from execution, scheduled for November 20, 2019. Is there still time to stop his execution based on evidence and DNA?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Brittany who says dad Charlie is being scammed by his online fiancée "Stephanie" & her roommate "Carina." Charlie hopes to get married when they meet in person. The real women in the photos are on stage & Charlie goes face-to-face!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: After a 4 mo. romance, Sheri married Tim. He told her he was a retired doctor, former professional hockey player, wealthy businessman & Canadian air force pilot. Sheri grew suspicious after 1 month that Tim was cheating, & unraveled a web of lies.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Maribeth and John say their 15-year-old daughter, Marie, has become distant, angry, and is no longer a charming honors student. Marie acts out, her parents place restrictions, and Marie runs away. Upon returning, Marie now claims she's pregnant. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Do "van life" blogger Gabby Petito's videos reveal what might have happened? TV host Nancy Grace, a former law enforcement officer & FBI defense tactics instructor, a criminal defense attorney & a body language expert all weigh in on the unusual details.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: New details of Rebecca Zahau's death: Was the scene staged to deceive police it was suicide? Renowned forensic pathologist Dr. Cyril Wecht reveals his findings to the family after examining Rebecca's exhumed remains. Does he think foul play was involved?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil meets Candice, who says she is convinced her mom, Lois, is being scammed by men online. Sister LouAnn says Lois sacrificed her 37-year marriage & retirement savings. Lois's only barrier to the love of her life? He is stuck in Africa. Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Janice & Wayne spoke with Dr. Phil as daughter Darbi, 16, had been missing for 24 days. Dr. Phil asked if the parents were more focused on their hatred toward each other than working together to find their child. Hours later, they got a phonecall. Pt. 2

programme.desc: The search for the new Valco Area Manager is finally over, but news of the successful candidate leaves Gavin reeling. After an unexpected incident in store, Gavin's thoughts also turn to the amount of cheap unhealthy food that Valco pushes.

programme.title: Trollied
programme.desc: New Area Manager Cheryl hits the ground running by holding a meeting of regional managers in-store, but when her personal relationship with Gavin is discovered she has quite the battle on her hands.

programme.title: Trollied
programme.desc: It's a big day for Gavin- the launch of his new healthy eating initiative. He's thrilled, especially when the local news arrive for an on-air interview, but with Cheryl stepping in as his boss Gavin starts to feel the pressure.

programme.title: Trollied
programme.desc: Duncan's back in the store and is far from impressed with Gavin's health food drive. After failing to pitch some of his junk food products as healthy, he decides to take matters into his own hands.

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark and Jez both have an eye for their attractive neighbor Toni.

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark tries to get Jez a job at JLB so he can actually contribute to the rent.

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark hits it off with a teenage goth at a party, and they go bowling with Jez and Toni.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Dr. Martin Ellingham and Pauline are surprised by the number of patients coming to see him on the last day before his surgery closes and he moves to London.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Curmudgeonly Martin Ellingham's plans to resume his career as a consultant in London are put on hold with the birth of the son he fathered with his now estranged partner, Louisa Glasson.

programme.title: Hamish MacBeth
programme.desc: Village reporter Isobel stumbles on a story that could put her in the big league. She emerges with a fresh image and a hot new boyfriend, leaving Hamish squirming with jealousy.

programme.title: Hamish MacBeth
programme.desc: Hamish turns a deaf ear to the local pirate radio station, which is having a remarkable influence on the town. But when the radio authority sends a defector van to close down transmission, he is caught up in a conflict of loyalties.

programme.title: Hamish MacBeth
programme.desc: Personal crisis takes Hamish to a remote island, from which he intends never to return. But he is not alone. Meanwhile, his absence from Lochdubh is keenly felt when his over-zealous replacement makes himself a nuisance.

programme.title: Hamish MacBeth
programme.desc: A family feud at the funeral parlour comes to a head. It is suggested that space aliens have snatched a body from the local burial ground.

programme.title: Peak Practice
programme.desc: Alice welcomes home daughter Patricia and granddaughter Nikki who have come to Cardale to get medical treatment for Nikki's leukemia.

programme.title: Peak Practice
programme.desc: Joanna becomes over-involved with a patient and soon regrets her actions. Alice and Nikki wait to see if their transplant has been successful, and old flames reignite between David and Patricia.

programme.title: Peak Practice
programme.desc: Despite knowing what they stand to lose, David and Patricia continue their affair. Unbeknownst to them, Alice is aware that something is brewing between them.

programme.title: Peak Practice
programme.desc: David's affair with Patricia begins to affect his work at the practice. Andrew doesn't understand what is wrong with him but Joanna is well aware of the fact he is cheating on Claire.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The GP returns to his former post at the surgery after the departure of Dr. Dibbs, agreeing to stay until a replacement is found.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: New receptionist Morwenna Newcross gets off to a bad start after arriving late on her first day, and her hyperactive behavior leads Martin to believe she is high on drugs.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa's hippie mother Eleanor arrives in the village, immediately taking over Martin's kitchen to prepare a herbal tonic, which she later gives to the baby to stop his crying.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: PC Penhale is shocked by the unexpected arrival of his ex-wife Maggie, who appears to have forgotten that they separated years ago and wants to know why he left her.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una familia de cuatro miembros es secuestrada durante unas vacaciones en Barbados, la UAC es convocada para asistir al jefe de la unidad Jack Garrett (Gary Sinise) y a su unidad internacional en su investigación.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El cuñado del director Vance es el principal sospechoso cuando Gibbs y el equipo de NCIS investigan el asesinato de un marinero.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después del asesinato de un infante de marina, Tony y Ziva buscan a un teniente y capellán desaparecidos en Colombia con un amigo de Ziva. Mientras tanto, Jimmy elige padrino de boda.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de un incendio en un almacén que revela documentos de la Marina desaparecidos, el equipo de NCIS se une a la investigación de la policía de Baltimore, reencontrando a Tony con un joven de su pasado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: NCIS investiga un incendio en un buque. Se eleva la seguridad en instalaciones navales. DiNozzo y Ziva van a Italia por un dispositivo explosivo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Quien se aleja
programme.desc: Cuando la inmunidad diplomática complica un caso de abuso infantil para Danny y Baez, Frank interviene, a pesar de no tener jurisdicción en el caso.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Dentro y fuera
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un líder de pandilla, Danny y Baez descubren que el presunto asesino es un ex convicto que tiene una relación romántica con su oficial de libertad condicional, quien podría estar ayudando a encubrir el crimen.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Almas perdidas
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un conductor ebrio que mató a una madre y su hijo, Danny y Baez se debaten entre cumplir con su deber y buscar justicia al descubrir la conexión entre el sospechoso y la víctima.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Apuesta alta
programme.desc: Cuando el hermano de Linda, Jimmy (Kevin Dillon), se mete en problemas con la mafia, le suplica a Danny que lo ayude a mantenerse a salvo hasta que la situación se calme

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una familia de cuatro miembros es secuestrada durante unas vacaciones en Barbados, la UAC es convocada para asistir al jefe de la unidad Jack Garrett (Gary Sinise) y a su unidad internacional en su investigación.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una familia de Maryland aparece asesinada en la mesa de su comedor, el equipo localiza a otros familiares y amigos para descubrir secretos de su pasado, esperando averiguar que puedo haberlo llevado a ello y encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando tres personas implicadas en asesinatos, afirman que fueron atacadas por un “monstruo sombrío con garras” en el momento en que ocurrió cada crimen. La UAC busca a un sospechoso que controla sus mentes.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando aparecen víctimas de disparos en el área de Los Ángeles en una posible relación con actividades criminales, la UAC busca a un justiciero sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de un incendio en un almacén que revela documentos de la Marina desaparecidos, el equipo de NCIS se une a la investigación de la policía de Baltimore, reencontrando a Tony con un joven de su pasado.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Eight modern-day cowboys and cowgirls train to compete for the first-ever million-dollar prize in horse reining, one of the toughest and most dangerous sports in the world.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: As the riders prepare for the Cactus Classic, Matt struggles when his horse has health issues, and Abby feels the pressure in her first competition since going solo.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Leading up to the Run for a Million show, Andrea undercuts Matt's search for the perfect horse, Abby deals with a flooded practice arena, and Craig seeks a much-needed payday.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: At the National Reining Breeders Classic, Jason has a chance to prove his skills equal Andrea's, and Cade has to come through in the clutch.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Abby faces a tough decision, Casey deals with mounting home-construction costs, and the pressure rises as the riders choose the horses they'll take to Run for a Million.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: In the first annual Run for a Million in Las Vegas, the riders compete for the first-ever million-dollar purse in horse-reining history.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Bill Simcox is a strong believer in family and community he takes pride in driving for his wife and two kids.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Ed and Linda should be spending their golden years relaxing. Instead, they spend most days and nights working on the road, miles from home and family.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Stacy Toney was on a route when Katrina devastated the New Orleans area last fall. Amazingly his home escaped major damage but his brother was not as lucky.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Check it out, as the Chrome Shop Mafia get spiritual; transforming his run down Freightliner FLD into Richard's own personal sanctuary.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Mark Ferguson, his wife Kim and their three year old daughter Katelyn are homeless; crammed inside his 95 Pete 379. Don't miss as the Chrome Shop Mafia transform Mark's rundown ride into a home he and his family can finally be proud of.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Frank Russell suffers from Lyme disease, and its side effects greatly affected Frank's ability to drive a truck. Get ready, as the Mafia rips Frank's old Kenworth apart to create a living breathing bio-mechanical truck as tough as the man who drives it.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: The Baize brothers transport military supplies. Because their cargo is top secret, they must guard the rig at all times. The Mafia turns the truck into the ultilmate transport!

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: The Chrome Shop Mafia steps in and turns Michael Watkins' truck into a beautiful memorial to his son.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Michael Condron's truck transforms into something straight ou of an action movie and the inside becomes a state of the art movie theatre.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: The Chrome Shop Mafia wants this trucker to get a good night's sleep. Check it out as they update Don Scott's seats and turn his truck into an icon of Midwestern Americana.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: The Chrome Shop Mafia kick their creative juices into high gear and fast forward Sylvester Thompson's truck into the future.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: The Chrome Shop Mafia gives Kevin and Gail a getaway truck straight out of the 1930s. Don't miss it, as the Mafia takes a totally custom design and riddle it with bullet holes.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Matthew Graves is a loving father and sole provider of six children. He'is never home; working weekends and most holidays. Watch as they transform Matthew's overworked Peterbilt into an iconic monster truck befitting of the "Graves" family.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Joseph Poole had a distinguished career in Vietnam, Joseph took to the highways and has been trucking for the past thirty-one years. He wants kids to know that driving a truck is a noble profession that contributes to the prosperity of America.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Wes Adier used to ride bulls in the rodeo circuit, but he and his wife, Gloria, run a small trucking business to care for their five children. Wes's wife wants to repay all of his sacrifices and the Chrome Shop Mafia are happy to take up the challenge.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Mark Phillips' love for trucking nearly cost him his life. He was in a near fatal accident that paralyzed him from the waste down. Don't miss it as the Chrome Shop Mafia reward Mark for his determination.

programme.desc: Aired 3/31/2017. The chilling account of a man who survived his encounter with the notorious serial killer, who managed to evade police scrutiny for years.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Desierto

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte VI: Jason vive

programme.title: El dictador

programme.title: La chica de rojo

programme.title: Duro de vender (el que no enseña no vende)

programme.title: Último viaje a Las Vegas

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerto al cirujano cardíaco Darryl Sutorius en el sótano de su lujosa casa de Cincinnati, la policía asume que se suicidó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Es musgo, no grama
programme.desc: Una joven fue encontrada muerta en un campo de golf en las Bahamas. El césped de ese campo era tan distintivo que tenía valor probatorio. La evidencia llevó a la policía a dos sospechosos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1993, la joven madre Tammy Tatum fue encontrada agredida sexualmente y asesinada en su departamento de Longmont, Colorado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1987, la muerte de Crystal Purcell fue considerada un accidente. Luego en el 2001, Barbara Purcell llamó a la policía para sugerir que su desaparecido esposo había matado a Crystal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se descubrió un esqueleto humano en las marismas de Carolina del Norte y, cuando los investigadores descubrieron que había estado muerta durante 18 meses, sabían que sería difícil descubrir quién era, y mucho más quién la mató.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se descubre el cuerpo descompuesto de una adolescente, la policía no tiene pistas sobre su identidad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intrusión bienvenida
programme.desc: Un hombre le dice a la policía que le disparó a un intruso que había atacado y asesinado a su esposa. El marido pinta un cuadro trágico y es apodado héroe.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El mundo es un escenario

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Emboscada en la escuela dominical

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick returns to Degrassi after the “Whack Your Brain” debacle at the hands of Spinner, Jay, and Alex. Toby and Mr. Raditch try to convince him to take the afternoon off, to go home and cool off, but an oddly calm Rick chooses to stay.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After the shooting at Degrassi, the full school board counseling response team moves in. And so does the media. Local reporter, Rachel Roberts, has decided to make Sean the hero of her piece.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig has a problem – the recording deal he and his band won last year is about to expire, but “Downtown Sasquatch” is nowhere near ready to record. With Jimmy in the hospital, they’re missing a key member.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back with Ashley and he’s determined not to screw it up this time.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Distraught when Ashley refuses his proposal, Craig falls into a major rage, completely trashing his hotel room.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Degrassi has a new hottie in Grade 9 and Manny’s got her eye on him. Especially since her “boyfriend” Spinner can’t even be bothered to take a night off work to come to the Cupid Dance she’s organized.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Something’s wrong with Emma. Though she’s frustrated at being treated with kid gloves by everyone since the school shooting, she’s not sure how she’d rather be treated. So she just keeps going on, numbly reassuring everyone that she’s fine.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma steps into the lead role in Dracula, but her recent extra-curricular activities with Jay prove even more dramatic.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner has difficulty dealing with the return of injured Jimmy. He hasn’t talked to him since the shooting, and his guilt over what he did leaves him unable to welcome Jimmy back to school.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie is finding it hard to make ends meet now that she’s living on her own and hates relying on her mother for rent, especially with its obligatory dinners to pick up the cheque.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige and Matt are totally in love, so what if they have to keep it secret? It’s worth all the extra effort.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With school coming to a close, Marco is making huge plans for his summer with Dylan – and their future. He’s considering fast-tracking to graduate high school, joining Dylan in university a year earlier.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After dutifully picking up the Spirit Squad slack for a love-struck Paige all year, Manny feels betrayed when Paige claims all the glory. So Manny plots her revenge with a complicated cheer that leaves Paige with a broken leg on Prom Night.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley’s leaving for the summer, and the idea of their temporary farewell and the stress of writing a song for Kevin Smith’s movie -- is making him, well, nuts. So Craig decides to do whatever it takes to follow her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Frustrated by everything around him, Craig runs away. As he wanders the street, he befriends a young busker nicknamed, “Skinny”.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Paige and Spinner awkwardly discuss last night's surprising kiss-fest, Darcy interrupts. She regrets their fight and breakup. But Spinner tells her he meant what he said – if Darcy can’t accept him, past and all, they're through.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Another year at Degrassi kicks off and Manny decides she’s going to be a serious actress, whatever it takes.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Land of Giants: A Walking With Dinosaurs Special
programme.desc: Witness the spectacle of the fearsome predator Giganotosaurus.

programme.title: The Giant Claw: A Walking With Dinosaurs Special
programme.desc: Zoologist Nigel Marvin travels back in time on a prehistoric safari.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the opthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the leaellynasaura and the tyrannosaurus.

programme.title: The Making Of: Walking With Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Animatronics, computer animation and science re-create the dinosaurs' world.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: The Maori struggled for survival 1,000 years ago in a New Zealand populated by giant birds.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the opthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the leaellynasaura and the tyrannosaurus.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Doom
programme.desc: The Krynoid demands that the Doctor be surrendered to it. But the Doctor escapes to seek help. Sarah and Scorby, still trapped on the estate, battle against the living plants.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Doom
programme.desc: The Doctor, Sarah, and Scorby are hunted down by the mad Harrison Chase. Outside the Krynoid prepares to germinate, sending its deadly seed pods out across the land.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Deadly Assassin
programme.desc: The Doctor returns to Gallifrey and races to prevent a tragedy.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Deadly Assassin
programme.desc: The Time Lord president has been assassinated and the Doctor is the prime suspect.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Deadly Assassin
programme.desc: The Doctor enters the virtual world of the Matrix hoping to track down the Master.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Deadly Assassin
programme.desc: The Master makes his final bid to release the devastating power of the Time Lords.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Robots of Death
programme.desc: The TARDIS takes the Doctor and Leela to a huge, mobile sand mine on an alien world.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Robots of Death
programme.desc: The Doctor and Leela are blamed for the murder of one of the sandminer's crew.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Robots of Death
programme.desc: Taren Capel is using the robots to carry out the murders.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Robots of Death
programme.desc: As the robots close in, the Doctor and Leela join forces with the crew to fight back.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Talons of Weng-Chiang
programme.desc: The Doctor and Leela arrive in Victorian London where many young women have disappeared.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Talons of Weng-Chiang
programme.desc: The Doctor and Leela take refuge at the home of Professor Litefoot.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Talons of Weng-Chiang
programme.desc: Weng-Chiang is desperate to recover his lost time cabinet.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Talons of Weng-Chiang
programme.desc: The Doctor plans to confront Li H'sen Chang, but Greel no longer needs his servant.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Talons of Weng-Chiang
programme.desc: Magnus Greel has recovered his lost time cabinet and the Doctor hurries to track him down.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Talons of Weng-Chiang
programme.desc: The Doctor tracks Greel to his secret hideaway at the House of the Dragon.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Horror of Fang Rock
programme.desc: The Doctor and Leela are on Fang Rock island where a murderous creature is at large.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Horror of Fang Rock
programme.desc: A thick fog surrounds Fang Rock as an alien menace stalks the island.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Horror of Fang Rock
programme.desc: The survivors are in the lighthouse, but the Doctor is still worried about the creature.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Horror of Fang Rock
programme.desc: The alien Rutan begins to pick off the remaining humans one by one.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Destiny Of The Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana arrive on a desolate planet, but soon find that they aren't alone.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Destiny Of The Daleks
programme.desc: The Movellans try to discover the purpose of the Daleks.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Destiny Of The Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana are trapped underground and the Daleks are moving in for the kill.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Destiny Of The Daleks
programme.desc: In their plan to defeat the Daleks, The Doctor and Romana face a terrible quandary.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Invasion of Time
programme.desc: The Doctor returns to Gallifrey to claim his position as President of the Time Lords.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Invasion of Time
programme.desc: The Doctor orders K9 to lower the Gallifrey's defences.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Invasion of Time
programme.desc: The Doctor is accused of betrayal when the Vardans invade Gallifrey.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Rottweilers with behavior problems; a small mixed-breed fails two obedience classes; a vizsla needs help adjusting to a move from the country to the city.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Doberman mix instigates fights at the dog park; a Pomeranian charges other dogs; an aggressive terrier mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Actress Denise Richards needs help getting in control of her three dogs; a miniature pinscher bites visitors; a lazy basset hound.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Weimaraner is aggressive towards anyone who turns on one of the motorized bikes used to deliver the mail; an aggressive shar-pei; an Australian red cattle dog who barks incessantly.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two Chihuahuas who fight whenever they are in the same room; a dog who attempts to prevent his owner's boyfriend from leaving the house; a dog who is obsessed with moving water.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and explores the history or misunderstood dog breeds to dispel myths about aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar comes the the aid of his good friend Dr Rick Garcia, a vet who is having trouble taming a terrier with epilepsy; Cesar helps a timid Rottweiler called Tank.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A close-knit community on Moorpar in California finds itself endangered by a collection of mischievous dogs, including three huskies.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to restore the peace between a Chihuahua mix and a Mastiff, and tackles an out-of-control pit bull puppy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: When Susan MacDonald met Cobar, an Australian koolie dog, she thought it would be a match made in heaven, but she was wrong; a Shar-Pei mix is afraid of his own reflection.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A wheaten terrier mix is so attached to her owner that she won't leave his side; a shar-pei who is aggressive towards other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An English Bulldog who is destroying her owner's house and aggressive towards their other dog; Howie Mandel's chihuahua is aggressive towards him and his wife.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Daschund Lotus is very territorial; his aggression sends his owner Chari to the hospital; Cesar makes a house call to see Joey, a German Shepard who is territorial over the second story of his owner's home.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A French bulldog is nervous around other dogs and occasionally nips at people; a Vizsla who resists going outside due to her fear of cars.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa, who's just turned 18 and is studying to become a bondsman, gets to do some on-the-job training when she helps Dog hunt for Wayne, who's run out on a bond for second-degree assault.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is sick as a dog, but he still must lead the hunt for a fugitive named James. James' girlfriend tries to cover for him, but Dog surprises James in his bedroom and leads him away in cuffs.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth buys Dog a shirt with an embroidered chicken, but Dog explains he only wears shirts with pictures of either Jesus or a Harley-Davidson. When it's time to go to work, the team goes after Necia, a fugitive with felony charges pending.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Christmas day, and Dog sets out to nab Raymond, who robs to support his ice habit, and give him a little Christmas gift - shiny new handcuffs.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth must go after their former housekeeper, Lisa, who's jumped bond. They know this case will be tricky because Lisa knows everyone in the family. Luckily, Beth's nephew, Jason, is visiting and is quickly put to work as the bait.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Before Tim heads out for a tough day of bounty hunting, he likes to get in a little quality time with his daughter, Summer Rain.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After giving a rousing speech to an audience of enthusiastic grade-schoolers, Dog catches up with an old friend, Sheriff Tommy Cayetano, to talk business. Dog's got a tough fugitive, named Mia, to catch and Tommy is happy to lend a hand.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows very little about Peter, but what he does know, he doesn't like! Not only is he currently facing two counts of second degree sexual assault, about week ago, he dropped out of sight before missing his court date.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are finally getting married! They've been together for more than ten years, but Dog is determined, as he puts it, to "marry his common law wife the Christian way."

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth are off to the Big Island for their wedding. They hope to relax for a few days but it turns out Leland has a fugitive he needs to catch and despite the time limit, neither Dog nor Beth can resist the opportunity to catch a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team must deal with misleading informants, belligerent boaters, and angry drunks when they go after Kimberly, a traffic offender with over 20 violations. And if that isn't enough, Dog has another problem -- Duane Lee is sick.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket--Heidi and Stephanie.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir-crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources--the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog kick-starts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Schnauzer jumps over hurdle; two birds fighting beside a pond and fall in the water while still fighting; dog runs up keep falling down; at church young boy falls during ceremony.

programme.title: Pick A Puppy
programme.desc: The Golds Family is looking for a rescue dog to help teach their two young kids about responsibility and caring. They're visited by three great rescue dogs- a Labrador Retriever mix, a Beagle mix, and a German Shepherd mix.

programme.title: To The Rescue
programme.desc: Tommy explores service dog training at the Patriotic Service Dog Foundation. These dogs provide companionship and peace to veterans and first responders, giving their humans a new purpose.

programme.title: Dogs with Jobs
programme.desc: Malcolm: Arson Dog (Montreal, Quebec) - In the city with the most arson crimes in North America, Malcolm the Labrador is helping to bring dangerous criminals to justice.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian and head nurse Sarah tend to an injured swan at a fishing lake. Meanwhile, Bobby (a canine member of the North Yorkshire police force) is brought into the surgery to have an operation.

programme.title: Pet Obsessed: Pets Who Explore
programme.desc: Around the world, or just around the corner, these curious pets like to explore.

programme.title: Breeder of the Pack
programme.desc: If there were a doggie Olympics, Kayl McCann would be captain of the Canadian team. Her days (and nights and weekends) revolve around breeding these smart, sassy and speedy dogs.

programme.title: Rescue Vet
programme.desc: A French Bulldog and a cat in need are rescued by the vet's.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: Alan Davies returns for what’s set to be an even bigger and better third series of The Dog Rescuers.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian is reunited with an alpaca he delivered by C-section when she develops a mystery eye problem. A heavily pregnant ewe is rushed into the Huddersfield hospital. Peter examines his brother's terrier. Matt treats 3 marmosets.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: It's Sunday morning, but it's no day of rest for Julian as he heads to the Taylors' farm. One of their sheep has prolapsed a few days after he delivered her lamb, and Julian has his work cut out to receive another reward of freshly laid eggs.

programme.title: To The Rescue

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, Tiffany Rowell and three of her friends were brutally murdered in affluent Clear Lake, Texas.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, Rebecca Barney and her soon-to-be ex-husband Fred were found shot to death in their Tulsa, Oklahoma, home, which had been set on fire.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, Kathy Lorick was murdered on a Concord, California jogging trail while talking to her husband on her mobile phone.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, the body of Colorado real estate developer Alan Helmick was found by his wife, Miriam, who then became the prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2005, the body of young mother Summer Baldwin was found in a suitcase in a Texas landfill.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, nursing student Tamika Huston went missing from her Spartanburg, South Carolina home. A tip led detectives to her car, where they found an unknown house key that could help solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, funeral director Lonnie Turner, Sr. was found shot to death. His son Lonnie Jr. became the prime suspect, particularly after it was discovered that the murder was committed with his gun. However, he had an alibi for the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, young mother Tammy Tatum was sexually assaulted and murdered in her Longmont, Colorado apartment. Police initially suspected her estranged husband, but did not have enough evidence to charge him and the case went cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Special Tribute
programme.desc: 25 years after its premiere, Forensic Files remains the most successful true-crime series of all time. Inspired by the O.J. Simpson murder case, the series went onto over 400 episodes where science catches the bad guys.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A retired police officer is found dead with a single gunshot wound to the head. His wife says the motive was robbery, but later tells police he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services, then disappears. When her abandoned car is found, the tank is empty and a gas can she kept in her trunk for emergencies is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When investigators found Bruce Miller dead in the office of his junkyard business, the crime scene was almost pristine. But when a computer forensics expert examined computers owned by the victim's wife and her lover, he found all the evidence needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in a Mexican resort draws law enforcement resources on both sides of the border. At first glance, the motive appears to be robbery, but careful analysis of the forensic evidence points to something more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, St. Cloud teenager Jason MacLennan returned home after a night out with friends and discovered his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Modesto, California teenager goes missing. With no signs of struggle in her home, police suspect she has simply run away — until her naked, bruised body is discovered in a ditch 20 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Two men are murdered while sleeping in their beds. The next night, arson destroys a family planning clinic. Investigators wonder whether some shards of glass, paint chips and a chicken feather could link what appear to be two separate crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghostly Refuge
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Oswego, New York to investigate the renowned Fort Ontario. TAPS has investigated many forts, but never one that once served as a sanctuary for Jewish refugees during World War II.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Paranormal Politics
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads down South to help two different families find some closure. First stop is Baton Rouge, Louisiana to investigate the Old State Capital Building, which has endured theCivil War and a congressman's death.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Tunnels of Terror
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Lockport, New York to investigate an underworld of tunnels. It holds a mystery of possible murder, multiple deaths and frightening phenomena. What stories do the spirits of Lockport Caves want to tell?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Paranormal Pioneers
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Gloucester, Massachusetts to investigate Hammond Castle.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Higher Dead/ucation

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Due Date With Death
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Rochester, New York to investigate the Rochester Public Library's 15 years of claims. There's reason to believe that two deaths associated with the building could be behind the activity.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después de un viaje a Atlantic City Borgata, donde el ganador pronto será un gran Chef, los competidores deben preparar un plato original que se servirá en el aclamado hotel.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay cocina para los cuatro Chefs restantes y luego les dice que repitan lo que han preparado. Posteriormente, se planea una propuesta de sorpresa para el menú de postres.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los tres finalistas preparen una comida para 100 de los mejores Chefs de Los Ángeles. El ganador aparece en un programa de televisión, mientras que los perdedores tienen que lavar y planchar la ropa de cama.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos finalistas deberán trabajar con un arquitecto para diseñar los espacios del restaurante para el desafío de la cena final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos últimos concursantes se enfrentan en su última competencia de la cena final. El ganador asume el cargo de Chef en el Borgata Hotel, Casino and Spa en Atlantic City.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la primera parte del estreno de la temporada, dieciséis concursantes tienen la oportunidad de alcanzar el estrellato culinario y un puesto de Chef ejecutivo en la ciudad turística canadiense de Whistler, Columbia Británica.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la parte final del estreno de temporada, vuelve un competidor de la quinta temporada y los quince cocineros restantes se preparan para una cena marinera.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay despierta a los Chefs restantes en medio de la noche y les ordena que preparen una cena de espaguetis para los bomberos hambrientos. Los perdedores deben lavar y encerar los camiones de bomberos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los competidores deben crear perros calientes de proporciones perfectas para las celebridades Drew Lachey, John O'Hurley, Tom Green, Melinda Clarke, Christopher 'Kid' Reid y Kristy Swanson.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los doce Chefs restantes deberán planificar un saludo gastronómico por el regreso de un marine americano. El equipo perdedor tendrá que limpiar y decorar la fiesta de Tana Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes deben crear comidas de tres platos que sumen solo 700 calorías. Los ganadores fueron a la playa con la jugadora de voleibol de playa Annett Davis.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes tiran los dados para determinar qué ingredientes usar para su plato de desafío. El equipo ganador gana un viaje a Las Vegas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los nueve Chefs restantes realizan una prueba de sabor a ciegas. Los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay en un comedor completamente oscuro donde no pueden ver lo que están comiendo.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes hacen crepes. Los ganadores cenarán en un restaurante francés mientras los perdedores se preparan para un servicio de cena con temática francesa.

programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. Using Zartan's synthoid technology, Cobra commander replaces key politicians and military leaders in an effort to cut off the Joes' funding.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Cobra's s plot proves to be working… until Destro discovers a duplicate of himself constructed by Cobra commander. The angered Destro takes information on the synthoids to the only people on Earth who can stop Cobra: G.I. Joe.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra commander hires a gypsy to summon the spirits of three great warriors from the past. Once in control of the ghosts, he commands them to destroy G.I. Joe. But the Baroness, now relieved of her duties, tells the Joes how to eliminate the threat.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: The Joes go Hollywood as technical advisers on a movie about their special-missions unit. But when the filmmakers attempt to use a captured Cobra stinger, Cobra Commander has another idea for the movie's ending.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Led by the Drednoks, gangs run wild in the streets to prevent the election of a candidate who wants to clean up the city. The gangs don't know that Cobra is funding his opponent, and the gang outbursts are calculated to ensure a landslide victory.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra plans to throw the country into economic chaos! With a molecular regenerator at his fingertips, Cobra commander plans to disintegrate U.S. currency and replace it with Cobra coin. Flint, Ripcord, and Ace jump into action to help cancel these checks.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra kidnaps people with paranormal powers for a battalion of "Special Recruits," hoping to use their incredible gifts against the Joes.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Zartan, disguised as a notable French scientist, infiltrates the worldwide defense center on a mission to destroy the facility for Cobra. He's planted a bomb, and now the clock is ticking… can the Joe team find and defuse the bomb before it's too late?

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra uses Tomax and Xamot's company extensive enterprises to purchase the Red Rocket food chain and use its location as a network of secret missile launching bases. But the JOE team catches on to the conspiracy.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When a secret military satellite is forced out of orbit by Cobra, the Joe team races to its location before Cobra can get their hands on it. But both the Joes and Cobra find that a third party has entered the battle for the device.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: In a diabolical plan to control the world's fuel supplies, Cobra begins detonating oil tankers and pipelines by remote. But when sparks uncovers the frequency Cobra is using to destroy the tankers, the Joe team may be able to turn the tables on them!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra plots to attack the cities of the world with lava flow when they kidnap Dr. Shakur and bring him to their jungle base, planning to use his breakthrough technology to harness the energy of Earth's core and cause volcanic eruptions.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra schemes to use the animals of the world against humanity with a mind-control signal enabling them to make any animal do their bidding, and the device causes Junkyard to turn on the Joes. Can they defeat Cobra and get Junkyard back to normal?

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Flint, Bazooka, and the others have to fight their way through a deadly Cobra temple to reach a group of brilliant scientists whom Cobra has kidnapped. As the Joes try to navigate the deadly maze, they find there is nothing fun about this funhouse!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: An investigative reporter is convinced that Cobra poses no threat to national security…he doesn't believe the terrorist organization even exists! he follows the Joes on a mission, determined to expose their battle as a massive government hoax.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra steals an experimental nitrogen rocket fuel. But before the Joes can capture the crimson guard in possession of the fuel, he hides it in a greenhouse, where the volatile mixture mutates everything into gigantic man-killing plants.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra threatens to use their latest weapon, the Ion attractor, to pull down the aurora borealis, melt the polar ice caps and flood the world. With every costal city in danger, the Joes head to the north pole to try to put a stop to it.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Shipwreck and Snake Eyes continue to evade capture in an effort to get back to the Joe team with vital data about Cobra's control cubes.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra commander activates the pyramid of darkness, stranding not only the JOES but also his comrades the crimson twins. Always prepared with a backup plan, Tomax and Xamot have other designs for the pyramid and Cobra.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninjas, Lloyd, Sensei Wu and Misako journey to the Dark Island to find a ‘Temple of Light’ that can restore the Ninjas’ elemental powers but are attacked by Starteeth (barnacle-like star fish) that start eating through their ship.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After battling off Garmadon’s Stone Army, the Ninjas finally arrive at the Temple of Light where they harness their pure elemental powers, concentrating them onto Lloyd who becomes more powerful than he ever imagined.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #12 Missed by a Dollar
programme.desc: At an auction in New York, attendees are shocked when a mysterious man bids $1,000,000 on a plain diamond ring. The man himself is even more astounded when the President of the World Bank outbids him by a single dollar. The man is Lupin!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata arrives in San Marino after receiving a note from Lupin III. Instead of a declaration of a new theft, it's a wedding invitation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Marlow Brozzi, a soccer player from San Marino. A mafia member has proof that Brozzi is cheating so Brozzi approaches Lupin for help.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang managed to steal a fragment of Marie Antoinette's necklace, but Jigen has been captured by Nyx.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A toothache prompts Jigen to rush to a clinic in a ruined town. The doctor, Livia, says she'll only take a look at him if he'll let her hold on to his gun, so he has no choice but to hand it over.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Fujiko Mine is seen with the members of a failing circus troupe. A former member of the troupe, Tony Belacastro, known as the Magician, died ten years ago, but the secrets to his magic are written in his "Trick Recipes."

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: The widow Elena is the only one who knows where her late husband hid his fortune. Zenigata shows up to protect her from Lupin's gang, who are out to steal it from her. Zenigata and Elena go to her mountain retreat to hide from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Nyx, Agent MI6 of the British Secret Service, values his wife and daughters above all others, so he keeps his identity as MI6 a secret from them. However, one of his daughters is kidnapped by some mysterious men.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: An eerie old castle converted to a hotel, known as the "The Mansion of the Cursed Bride," where the ghost of a bride is said to appear. It's said that a priceless treasure rests in the hotel, so Lupin and the gang pay a visit.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Long ago a dictator was assassinated, and the assassins involved were later killed one by one. Goemon was one of those involved in the assassination. A former bodyguard of the assassinated dictator, the legendary sniper Zora, might be out for revenge...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is invited by both Fujiko and Rebecca to a couples-only wine auction party. Both women have their sights on the same thing: The Lovesick Pig, a legendary wine appearing in the auction.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca is kidnapped and Lupin must rescue her! Before she was kidnapped, Rebecca had been deciphering a book left behind by a genius scientist, and MI6 made the mysterious comment that it was the "Dream of Italy."

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin finally deciphers the book left behind by the genius scientist Uraga, and then mysteriously falls asleep. He ends up in a world where it's impossible to tell whether what he sees is a dream or reality. Is this the "Dream of Italy"?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has been arrested and imprisoned. He's tried everything he could to escape, but Zenigata stops him every time. Zenigata then sends Lupin to an even higher-security prison, just to be on the safe side. Has the end of Lupin III has come at last?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is so broke that he doesn't know what he'll eat tomorrow, so he concocts a plan to steal the Mona Lisa. But the Mona Lisa won't be easy to steal. He does his best to weave through the security net Zenigata has set.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Like a she-devil, the diamond "Cleopatra's Soul" is constantly changing owners. In search of the diamond, Lupin arrives at what appears to be an ordinary school...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen, and Goemon decide to go eat some tasty sushi, but when they hop in the car to leave, they find a dog inside. Lupin promises to drop the dog off with Fujiko while they're out getting sushi.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Greco is a man revered as a savior for defeating evildoers one after another. Everyone Greco targets die within 24 hours, killing and being killed by their own comrades. When provoked by Greco, Lupin and the gang head to Greco's church.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A mysterious portrait of Lupin appears at a major fashion show in Milan. When it's determined that the portraits have been painted by Leonardo Da Vinci, Lupin realizes something and rushes to the church where "The Last Supper" is displayed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While shopping with his family, Nyx is shot by someone and loses consciousness. He wakes up bound, and before he is Percival, his boss from his days as MI6.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has stolen the car that the famous singer Nora Anita loved and drove for nearly half a century. Zenigata and the police are after him, but they won't make a move for fear of damaging the priceless car. Where is Lupin headed in the treasured car?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While in Italy, Lupin gets a call from someone claiming to have kidnapped Fujiko. The kidnapper blackmails Lupin into stealing a marionette once owned by Gennai Hiraga and now being kept in a mansion in Tokyo.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Declarations of theft show up throughout the city, and they all bear the message "Tonight I'm going to get you, Lupin III," with a lipstick mark underneath. The one who's been distributing the notes is Rebecca.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Da Vinci announces that he is going to unveil his latest work in San Marino. Its title is "World Harmony." After the announcement, for some reason, people all around the Italian Peninsula fall unconscious... and Lupin and the gang are no exception.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Throughout his career, throwing a no-hitter was one accolade that had eluded Hall of Famer Tom Seaver. There were many close calls and one-hitters, but finally on June 16, 1978, Tom Terrific made history with the Reds and kept the Cardinals hitless.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/14/79: In a pivotal Game 5, the Pirates score seven runs late in the game. Jim Rooker and Bert Blyleven throw a one-run game starting the Pirates' comeback in the 1979 World Series.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/17/79: After falling behind 3-1 in the 1979 World Series, the Pirates rallied to come back and take home a championship. Willie Stargell goes 4-for-5 with a home run in Game 7 to lift the Pirates to a 4-1 win over the Orioles.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/17/79: After falling behind 3-1 in the 1979 World Series, the Pirates rallied to come back and take home a championship. Willie Stargell goes 4-for-5 with a home run in Game 7 to lift the Pirates to a 4-1 win over the Orioles.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/21/80: Tug McGraw strikes out Willie Wilson on a 1-2 fastball in Game 6 sealing the Phillies' 4-1 win over the Royals, bringing home the franchise's first-ever World Series Championship.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/20/82: With the championship on the line, Bruce Sutter comes into the game in the 8th inning to blank the Brewers. The Cardinals captured their ninth World Series win in a dramatic Game 7 win at Busch Stadium.

programme.title: El precio de la historia

programme.title: El precio de la historia

programme.title: El precio de la historia

programme.desc: Tony travels around Emilia Romagna in a Ferrari with Chef Michael White.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations

programme.desc: Tony explores Hurricane Katrina's true impact on New Orleans.

programme.desc: Tony is on a mission to connect with his family in Uruguay.
