programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Lexie says her husband's ex, Stacy, is trying to destroy her marriage and she is putting a stop to it! Next, Juicy tells her boyfriend that she's been cheating on him. Later Patrick says he loves Tara but that hasn't stopped him from cheating on her.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Extreme Deception Indicated
programme.desc: Joe and Tammy have been together for 6 years and they have 2 children. Joe faces cheating accusations again and returns to Steve's stage for his lie detector results!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Edwin returns to the show after finding his current girlfriend Jenny in the closet with another man and wants a lie detector test! Then, Steve sorts through a messy love triangle of a bi-sexual and polyamorous couple, Spencer and Alisha!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Melody says that her boyfriend Alfred gave her a STD, but he denies it! Then, Latisha's husband Alfred is convinced she is cheating on him that he sends their kids to spy on her. Latisha thinks Alfred is covering up his infidelity!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Gina believes that daughter’s boyfriend Efrain is abusing her grandson. Her daughter wants to prove that Efrain is innocent, but her father Raul suspects she is covering for Efrain.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Veronica wants to prove that Willy fathered her child, but he believes the many rumors about her infidelity! Then, did Adam or Ryan father Heather's child? Adam's the father on paper, but her husband Dave wants him to sign over his parental rights!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Shawn proposed to Nicole after she said she was carrying his baby but refused to show him any proof and then claimed a miscarriage. Next, Kamesha believed Derrick was the one but began to doubt his fidelity. Will these couples make it to the altar?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Steve’s hosting another teen girl town hall to address critical issues all teen girls could face, including drug use, physical abuse, and online predators. No question is off-limits!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Pam suffered two miscarriages from the stress of her boyfriend Miguel's cheating accusations. Felisha confessed to cheating on her boyfriend Natron, but Natron denies fathering her two kids. The truth shall set some of these guests free!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Steve will put Brittany's sister Jami and boyfriend Luis on the lie detector test to find out if Luis coerced Jami into having sex. Then, did Cassandra sleep with her husband Greg's brother Collin? Is Collin their child's father?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Kayla's madly in love with Levi, her baby's father, whom she's been dating for years. But this relationship is far from ordinary. A few months back, Kayla's 17-year-old sister accused Levi of taking advantage of her while sleeping.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Did Everett touch his girlfriend Michelle’s daughter? Her ex Robert says that his 7-year-old daughter said so. Everett will take a lie detector test to disprove it! Don’t miss these shocking results!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Eugene and Kendra are tired of being harassed by Simone, his ex, who alleges he fathered her 3 children. While he does admit to sleeping with her, he denies the kids because he says she slept around! What will the DNA test results say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Teenager Megan lives with her older controlling boyfriend Rick. Megan cannot attend school, find a job, or even eat without his OK! Can her aunt and Steve get through to her?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Miranda says that her fiancée Charlie is guilty of cheating and taking drugs. Has he been cheating with Lisa, Miranda's worst enemy? He says that he stayed a couple of days at Lisa's house to make Miranda jealous! Can this relationship survive?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jon wants to start fresh and come clean to his fiancee about his secret affair. But first, his secret lover, Kirn, has some news for him! Then Racquel doesn't know why she's here, but when the babysitter arrives, she figures it out in a hurry!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La adolescente Megan vive con su antiguo novio controlador Rick. Megan no puede ir a la escuela, buscar trabajo, ni comer sin su permiso. ¿Pueden su tía y Steve lograr hacerla entender?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Jack está preocupado por sus nietos porque su nuera Carol ha sido negligente y tiene mal genio. Después, Kendra explica por qué de repente dio el bebé de Corey en adopción.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Joyia está desesperada por evitar que su amiga Stephanie vuelva con su problemático ex Scott. ¡Pero ella todavía lo ama! ¿Tendrá la voluntad de dejarlo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sharina thinks that Clarence is cheating on her because he's always out late. Plus, Chrystal doesn't want Earnie's ex Tenyia to live with them just because she's the mother of his child.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Tres años más tarde, Elizabeth todavía tiene muchas dudas sobre las intenciones de Manny con su familia y su marido Rodney está en medio. ¿Manny es inocente?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Cuando la gente normal necesita ayuda, Steve Wilkos está listo para responder a la llamada. Mira cómo Steve ayuda a la gente normal a defenderse y a luchar por sus creencias para promover la justicia para todos.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Hoy Danny por fin está listo para enfrentarse al hombre ausente de su vida y responder a las preguntas de su vida. Steven da varias excusas para no ver a su hijo, pero ¿es posible redimirse?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Teneal y Richard cuentan historias diferentes, cada uno alegando que el otro no es apto para ser padre. La verdad se limitará a una prueba con el detector de mentiras, y los resultados serán impactantes.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Katrina cree que el novio de su hermana Kendra es un infiel y que tiene sexo con su mejor amiga, Nay-Nay. Después, John vuelve al escenario con algo sorprendente.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La familia de Jackie no confía en su novio cuando está con sus hijos, pero ella insiste en seguir con él. ¿Qué horrible verdad revelará la prueba del detector de mentiras de Shaqualla sobre su novio?

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Gail quiere más emociones en su vida, por lo que ha estado acostándose con el novio de su mejor amiga. Después, Dave se entera de que su novia de los últimos 3 años tiene una aventura y está dispuesto a todo para recuperarla, incluso ponerse un sostén.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Cliff quiere que Anna, la mejor amiga de su novia, los deje en paz. Después, el marido de Kelly le ruega que lo acepte de regreso, pero Kelly no quiere porque ya está con el hermano de su marido.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Greg le contará a su novia, Deidra, que trabaja en secreto como prostituto gay. El novio de Madrina sigue siendo infiel a ella con su ex. Después, Ro-Ro tiene dos novias y hoy la obligarán a elegir a una de ellas.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Mehren dice que todo estaría bien con su novio, John, si su esposa los dejara en paz. ¡Greg ha venido a decirle a su novia que le ha sido infiel con su mejor amiga, Yolanda!

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Natalia, toma veneno para lograr el perdón de Ricardo. Ricardo viendo que está tan enferma, se conmueve y la recibe junto a Mariana. Consiguen salvarla y él le pide a su padre que le permita regresar a su hogar.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Teobaldito y Mairita hablan de sus familias cuando llega Rosaura con regalos para la niña, que supone es hermana del niño. Después llega Luis Mario, que viene a traerle merienda a los chicos.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura le cuenta a su abuela que está intentando recordar que fue lo que hizo con su hija y cuál fue el parque donde estuvo. Guillermo le propone a Jimena que no se casen.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Camelia y Griselda comienzan a llevar a cabo el plan que tienen para volver loca a Rosaura, mientras que Rosaura discute con su abuela por haberle permitido a Luis Mario entrar en su habitación.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Silvano visita a Rosaura en su casa y le exige que se aleje de Patricio para siempre y que juntos traten de ser felices. Rosaura se niega a seguirlo y junto a Claudia le insisten que se marche.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Tras haber perdido a su hijo, Marcela da por terminada la relación entre ella y Maximiliano. Yolanda confiesa todos los crímenes de Octavia ante la policía.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Marfil le cuenta a Camila la pelea que tuvo con Diana y de sus problemas con Pedro. Caramelo le da ánimos a su papá y le dice que haga un viaje para olvidarse de Fedora. Ignacio e Isabel buscan cosas de valor en la maleta de Octavia.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Ignacio ataca a Octavia y ella lo apuñala con una navaja. Sharon le dice a su médico que ella en realidad quiere cambiar y ser mejor para que la acepten. Marcela le dice a Diana que se va a divorciar de Max.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Maximiliano acepta el divorcio con Marcela. Pedro escucha la conversación entre Marfil y Camila y escucha sus planes de asesinarlo para quedarse con su fortuna. Fedora y Octavia se enfrentan por última vez.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Camelia se van de viaje en el yate pero se presenta en el muelle, Patricio. Camelia lo ve y se queda con la excusa de que dejó la cartera en el carro.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: La avioneta dañada pasa por encima de Rosaura. Mairita llorando le pregunta a Anselmo si Rosaura va a regresar. Anselmo le dice que a lo mejor no. Rosaura ve la avioneta y comienza a gritar.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Panchita esconde la ropa de Luis Mario para verlo desnudo. Rosaura llega a darle la comida a Luis Mario y está totalmente desnudo. No sabe que Rosaura está con el.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario le dice a Eduarda que se va a casar pero no con Eva. Ella trata de averiguar quién es la mujer pero él no se lo dice. El doctor va a ver a doña Cruz y les dice que la dejen dormir.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: La policía va siguiendo a Karina. Rosaura le dice que se detenga pero ella no quiere y se estrellan. Luis Mario le dice a Eva que se va a casar para llevarle la contraria a Eduarda.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Eneru strikes Angel Island with a devastating lightning bolt, and Luffy continues his heroic climb up the giant beanstalk. The rubber-man refuses to stop until he rings the golden bell – no matter what the cost!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Eneru continues his thunderous barrage, Nami hatches a plan to give Luffy one more shot at a grudge match with god. Zoro’s at the center of the scheme, but he might not survive his mission!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami’s quick thinking gets Luffy closer to god, and the Straw Hat captain launches himself into the center of a sinister storm! Can he find a way to destroy Eneru’s looming cloud of death?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Luffy’s epic battle with Eneru, sunny skies chase away the storms, and the cloud-dwelling citizens of Angel Island turn their attention to rebuilding their homeland.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin attempts to decipher the riddle of a mysterious poneglyph, Usopp barters with the locals, and Luffy raids the priceless treasures of the legendary city of gold!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With a little help from their new friends – and a giant octopus – the Straw Hats bid farewell to Skypiea and begin their descent back to the deep blue sea. Where they’ll land is anyone’s guess!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After a frightening fall from the clouds, the Straw Hats find themselves trapped inside an impenetrable Marine stronghold. The crew gets separated, the Going Merry is impounded, and rumors of ghosts run rampant!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Nami searches for the Going Merry, Luffy and Sanji pose as famous chefs, only to end up competing in a cooking contest with a beautiful mistress of the galley!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro is imprisoned and interrogated, and Chopper’s ill-chosen hiding spot lands him in the operating room along with a doctor who can’t stand the sight of blood!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s insatiable appetite betrays his true identity, and yet another member of his crew ends up in the brig when two Straw Hats try to fool Commander Jonathan with the same disguise!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Commander Jonathan sets a Straw Hat trap, but Luffy and Sanji are willing to risk it all to help spring their mates. Will a souvenir from the sky save the day – or will their escape plan be scuttled by foul play?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his gang make a break for the docks, and Commander Jonathan deploys armed guards in an attempt to slow down the Straw Hats. Only one thing is certain: somebody is going down for the count!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats are surrounded, outnumbered, blasted with tear gas. Taking a pretty, young doctor hostage may be their only hope for surviving long enough for a Merry reunion!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew were almost in the clear when Nami made a horrifying discovery: the Marines stole their gold! Now, the Straw Hats must sail straight into the thick of the fight to reclaim their lost riches!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp hatches a plan for a moonlit raid on the Marine vault, but Commander Jonathan is has a nasty surprise waiting for the pirates! Meanwhile, Sanji and Nami attempt to recover the waver.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The extreme arrogance of a Marine special investigator clears a path for Luffy and company to make their escape! Unfortunately, the Straw Hats still have to find their gold before returning to the high seas!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats may think they’re in the clear, but Commander Jonathan has one final trap waiting to ground the Going Merry! If Luffy’s crew is to escape, they’ll need a helping hand – or eight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his mates survive and near-death encounter with some mischievous sea monkeys only to land on a mysterious island where everything is much longer than it should be!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After a loyal horse and his recently-returned master are assaulted by thugs, Luffy is drawn into a Davy Back Fight with the Foxy Pirates. The Straw Hat captain never backs down from a challenge, but this contest could cost him his crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Davy Back Fight begins with a treacherous Donut Race around Ling Ring Long Land! The Straw Hats square off against the Foxy Pirates in a battle to see who loses a crew member!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami uses her considerable skill as a navigator to put the Straw Hats on the verge of victory, but the captain of the Foxy Pirates has more than a few dirty tricks up his sleeve!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Thanks to some foxy sabotage, Chopper has been lost to the enemy. The only hope for getting him back lies with Zoro and Sanji, but can they learn to work together in time to save the little reindeer?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Zoro take a beating at the hands of the Groggy Monsters, but they won’t give up the fight. With a little luck – and some teamwork – they’ll emerge victorious from round two of the Davy Back Fight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Round three of the Davy Back Fight is a rip roaring roller derby! Chopper’s fate still hangs in the balance, and the Straw Hats have a huge problem: Luffy doesn’t know how to skate!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the Davy Back Fight sprints toward a sensational finish, the Straw Hats find themselves on the brink of defeat! Luffy’s finally managed to stay on his skates, but the Foxy Pirates are notorious cheaters!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats somehow manage to defeat the Foxy Pirates and win back Chopper, but Luffy eagerly accepts the challenge of a rematch! What is the captain thinking? And will his crew mutiny?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A devious game of dodge ball costs the Straw Hats their archaeologist. Now, they’ll have to win an unusual uphill race to reclaim Robin and avoid losing another crew member!

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Castalians board the Andromeda to finalize the charter for the New Commonwealth. When the leader is discovered dead, Tyr is the main suspect.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka learns that her father's former business partner deals in a highly addictive drug called Flash. The rest of the crew holds a "garage sale" to earn money for new ship parts.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Andromeda discovers her "sister ship", the Pax Magellanic. The crew aboard Pax is 300 years old, but have not aged a day

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Tyr crash lands the Eureka Maru on a Nietzschean planet and develops amnesia. He must remember what he is doing before the Nietzscheans discover him and his crate of stolen goods.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Harper receives the "gift" of knowledge from a dying Perseid, only to discover that the Perseid was being hunted by a bounty hunter, who has now turned his attention to Harper.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan is arrested for assassinating a dictator 300 years ago, by the man he helped install in his place. The new dictator ended up being much, much worse.

programme.title: NightMan
programme.desc: Tragedy seems to follow an orphaned girl whom Johnny mentors. Tragedy turns dangerous when the girl is kidnapped.

programme.title: NightMan
programme.desc: Keyes returns and uses his high-tech computers as well as special Tarot cards to kidnap Night Man's friends.

programme.title: NightMan
programme.desc: Saskia has been kidnapped by Keyes, and Raleigh fears House of Soul will be destroyed.

programme.title: NightMan
programme.desc: Night Man must face Gore, a less intelligent duplicate of Slade.

programme.title: NightMan
programme.desc: Night Man fights Lucien Norcus, an illusionist who uses his powers to to trap people in his eternal hell.

programme.title: NightMan
programme.desc: As the title states, Nightwoman returns, this time to protect a queen from her evil husband and his voodoo priestess.

programme.title: Sanctuary

programme.title: Stephen King's Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: When a mill is reopened, several employees meet their deaths. The killings all occur between 11 p.m. and 7 a.m. the Graveyard Shift. Soon, the workers find a maze of tunnels leading to the cemetery and the horror that comes alive at night.

programme.title: Stephen King's Thinner

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Although they were the son and daughter of Zeus, Apollo and his twin sister Artemis were born under threats from the goddess Hera.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Zeus had a reputation for being a seducer of women. One day he lay with a mortal - Semele, the daughter of the king of Thebes. Their son Dionysus was brought up by nymphs.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Dedalus, a prominent Greek inventor, settled in Crete among King Minos’ court. Queen Pasiphaë, who had an all-consuming passion for a white bull, called upon his services.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: The Goddess of War Athena was the wisest, most level-headed and rational deity. She was born out of Zeus’ skull, wearing a helmet and holding a spear.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Kronos revolted against his father Uranus. He severed his father’s genitals and threw them into the sea, where they mingled with the foam and gave birth to Aphrodite.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Hermes was the youngest of the Gods of Olympus. Right from birth, he was an insolent, thieving, trickster God.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: In this myth, many versions of which have been passed down through the ages, Psyche is the Beauty.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Bellerophon, the grandson of Sisyphus, one of the Greek world’s worst criminals, dreamt of becoming a hero, of being equal to the Gods.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Perseus was not meant to come into the world. Fearing the fulfillment of the prediction according to which his grandson would kill him, King Acrisius shut his daughter Danaë away in a fortified tower.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: On his quest to find the Golden Fleece, Jason asked the cruel King of Colchis and his daughter Medea, a powerful sorceress, for help.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: We all know about Heracles’ unequaled strength and the twelve labors he had to carry out, but we know a great deal less about the way in which his life was turned upside down by terrible curses.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: No mortal endured more terrible a tragedy than Oedipus. He was the son of King Laius, King of Thebes.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Antigone was one of Oedipus’ four children. She had two brothers, Eteocles and Polynices, as well as a sister, Ismene.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Located in the bowels of the Earth, Tartarus was the prison of the Underworld, the place where fallen Gods and banished heroes ended up.

programme.title: Warrior Women

programme.title: Warrior Women
programme.desc: 200 years ago, a young woman brought the greatest empire in Asia to its knees. She was a master of kung fu, and the leader of 60,000 warriors who followed her unquestioningly into battle. Their enemy was the brutal and corrupt Qing Dynasty.

programme.title: Warrior Women
programme.desc: 60 A.D: Rome is at it's height, but in this most remote outpost, the Empire is about to be hit by the full fury of a woman's wrath. Her anger will kill 70,000 and defy Roman power in Britain.

programme.title: Warrior Women
programme.desc: Along the formidable west coast of Ireland, the legend of Grace O'Malley stands out like a freak wave. Born into a warring land of clan rivalries and the lawlessness of the high seas, Grace blew away the notion of a woman's place in the 16th century.

programme.title: Warrior Women

programme.title: Location, Location, Location

programme.title: Location, Location, Location

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: This week, we're back in Yorkshire catching up with lotto millionaires Roger and Lara Griffiths. Just over a year ago, this lucky pair scooped almost two million quid on the lottery and were desperate to splash out on a swanky new pad.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: With the market constantly shifting, there's no such thing as a "simple search" anymore. Our dynamic duo will have to work harder than ever before to make sure they come up with the goods.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In Glasgow is first time buyer project manager and property obsessive Adam. With a budget of £250,000, he's looked at 500 properties in the 9 months!

programme.title: Insidious
programme.desc: The terrifying story of a family who discover that dark spirits have possessed their home and that their son has inexplicably fallen into a coma. To save their son, they move, only to realize that it was not their house that was haunted.

programme.title: Insidious: Chapter 2
programme.desc: James Wan and Leigh Whannell return to deliver this follow-up to their low-budget successful creep-out, Insidious, which focused on a family who were haunted by a demon.

programme.title: Insidious: Chapter 3
programme.desc: A prequel set before the haunting of the Lambert family that reveals how gifted psychic Elise Rainier reluctantly agrees to use her ability to contact the dead in order to help a teenage girl who has been targeted by a dangerous supernatural entity.

programme.title: Mother's Day (2012)
programme.desc: Rebecca DeMornay is terrifying in this brutal gorefest. When her sons break into a home and take the owners hostage, she teaches them what real torture is all about. Costars Shawn Ashmore.

programme.title: The Haunting In Connecticut
programme.desc: After a family is forced to relocate for their son's health, they begin experiencing supernatural behavior in their new home, which turns out to be a former mortuary and séance parlor.

programme.title: The Haunting in Connecticut 2: Ghosts of Georgia

programme.desc: Sally moves to Rhode Island to live with her father and his new girlfriend in their 19th-century mansion. While exploring the house, Sally starts to hear voices coming from creatures in the basement whose hidden agenda is to claim her as one of their own.

programme.title: The Pallbearer

programme.title: Hard Eight
programme.desc: John, a half-bright loser stranded in Reno, is down to his last few bucks when Sydney, taking pity on him, buys him breakfast and offers him a few tips on making money in the casinos. Two years later, John has become Sydney's partner.

programme.desc: Leonard (Joaquin Phoenix) is a charismatic but troubled young man who moves back into his childhood home following a recent heartbreak. While recovering under the watchful eye of his parents, Leonard meets two women in quick succession.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive

programme.desc: A newlywed's hand gets stuck in a kitchen appliance and a college student is tormented by an injury down under; a heavy drinker is now sober and experiencing life-threatening complications; a woman appears to only have blood flow to half of her brain.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Plastered

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: A man charms his way into wealthy people's homes, then robs them blind.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: Seven prison inmates pull off the largest escape in Texas history.

programme.title: Intervention

programme.title: Intervention

programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck Southern gentleman turns into a murderous monster.

programme.desc: Fear spreads through a small Kentucky town after a family is murdered

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: In effort to keep peace, treaties were proposed to keep the aggressors of World War 1 under-armed. The ratio of military power was drastically in favor of the US and Great Britain. This might have successfully kept peace, if it was only given a chance.

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: Exchange rates and floundering economies were not the only things influencing how and where people lived. The motor-car and other technological advances were transformative, though some clung tight to the past...

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: As Paris lurched into 1929, it seemed on the surface (to those with deep pockets) that the party would go on forever. However, few saw the impending future claiming that these people were just hiding away from a harsh reality.

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: In the 20s there seemed to be some good candidates for leadership in Europe. But where were these people when the great depression hits, affecting the lives of people around the world?

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: As the effect of the depression in the US became clear, Japanese businessmen began to think that America would never recover. They then set their focus on East Asia, where the invasion of Manchuria had doubled the size of the Japanese empire.

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: No one knows for sure if early action would have stopped Adolph Hitler's ambition. But we do know that inaction certainly didn't. Buy why did neighboring countries refuse to act early? One word: Appeasement.

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: Some saw the idea of appeasement as the salvation of peace. Some were so blinded by it, that they either didn't see or ignored, Hitler's all too obvious strategic manipulation of territories.

programme.title: Death At Dawn - The Emperor's Last Battleship
programme.desc: Premuda, June 10th, 1918 605 am The Szent Istvan is sinking. The most modern battleship of the K.u.K. fleet has been hit by two torpedoes on its maiden voyage. A camera team aboard the Tegetthoff was sent out to film the first deployment of the new battle

programme.title: America in World War II

programme.title: America's Secret War

programme.title: Hitler's Bodyguard

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Ty visita a Marisa con la intención de abogar por el amor entre ella y su hijo. Cristóbal trata de enmendar los errores de Ví­ctor. Yaya tiene como tarea saber qué le está pasando a Lalo, mientras Cristóbal también intuye que algo está ocurriendo.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Lalo se prepara para su sesión de exámenes. Marisa debe enfrentar la verdad de Lalo ante Cristóbal, mientras Ví­ctor ruega por la salvación de su hijo. Sara organiza un evento en el hotel y quiere persuadir a las empleadas para que participen.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan

programme.title: Marido en alquiler

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Gabriel habla con Esther, quiere saber qué significa él para ella. Fernando se entera que lo vinculan con la muerte de Marcela y amenaza a Teresa Cristina con grabaciones de los encargos que ella le ha hecho. Griselda busca a Reinaldo y lo besa.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Griselda le pide perdón a Reinaldo por haber dudado de él. Se prometen que nadie va a interponerse entre ellos y van juntos a declarar ante el detective todo lo que saben de Teresa Cristina. Patricia enfrenta a su madre y le dice que su hora llegó.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Interceptan el teléfono de Fernando y escuchan cuando Teresa Cristina le pide que acabe con alguien, una mujer. Griselda se ofrece como carnada para finalmente atrapar a Teresa Cristina. Bárbara se marcha y le pide a Kike pasar un día con su hijo.

programme.desc: Scientists believe that Stargates are doorways to wormholes in time. As it turns out, the government may have already known that.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Biggest Search Yet

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: 1, 2, 3, 4, I Declare a Squatch War

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: From military radar to Navy aircraft, sightings of Unidentified Aerial Phenomena have become more frequent of late and been measured on ever more sophisticated technology. What could these visitors be after?

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: There are three types of close encounters, sightings, fleeting interactions, aliens taking humans for extended periods. We meet real people who have experienced alien life up close.

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: From military radar to Navy aircraft, sightings of Unidentified Aerial Phenomena have become more frequent of late and been measured on ever more sophisticated technology. What could these visitors be after?

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: Several US presidents throughout history have described encounters with UAPs. Is there already an agreement in place between our world leaders and intelligent alien life? And if so, who is keeping that information from the public and why?

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: In 1998 Astronauts captured images of a satellite in Earth's orbit. Is it the same alien object that Nicola Tesla detected in 1899, an alien probe known as the Black Knight?

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: Millions of years ago the Red Planet had a lot in common with Earth, but it's now a desert wasteland. Do the doorways recently discovered on the planet's surface lead to an existential lesson for our species?

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: According to physics, time travel is possible. So could it be that UAPs aren't coming from somewhere else, but from some when else. Could these UAPs be us, from the future?

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: Certain structures on our planet have stood the test of time and continue to astonish mankind. So much so, that alien intervention in their construction thousands of years ago, has yet to be ruled out.

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: In July of 2023, David Grusch, a former high ranking US Intelligence officer testified to a US government Oversight Committee that there are alien spacecraft located at secret facilities in the US.

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: Some places in the world, record more UAP sightings than the rest. So many so, in fact, that people flock from all over the world just for the chance to glimpse a flying saucer.

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: UAPs have only recently been witnessed entering the ocean at very high speeds. And since our oceans can be as much as six miles deep, is it possible that some of these UAPs were simply trying to get home?

programme.desc: On January 28, 1994, an Air France pilot, his crew and passengers witnessed a brightly-glowing red and brown disc-shaped object while flying to London.

programme.title: Rocky II

programme.desc: The life cycle of stars reveal to us the past and the future of Earth and ourselves.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity keeps us on the ground and the planets in their orbits, yet we only notice it when it's not there. In space we cheat gravity; falling just as fast but missing the ground. Now this fundamental universal force is slowly giving up its secrets.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Next Stop Mars
programme.desc: Mars has fired our imagination for thousands of years. The tantilizing possibility of life has made it the most inviting planet in our solar system. It is the only other place that man may one day call home.

programme.desc: As scientists and astronomers peer more closely and with evermore fidelity at nearby stars, they are discovering countless exo planets. How many Earth-like planets are out there? Could one of them hold life not so different from our own?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Shore to Shore
programme.desc: With low Earth orbit delegated to private companies, NASA is free to develop the deep space hardware for missions to Mars and beyond. The Orion space craft and SLS launch system are well on their way to delivering this capability.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: The evidence to prove some of Einstein's theories had long been elusive, beyond the capabilities of technology, until now. It appears that Einstein is once again triumphant as we discover the latest in deep space observations.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: The ESA-JAXA joint Bepi-Colombo Mission is moments away from launch. The target is Mercury which has been too long neglected; this mission will shed new light on this strange world of light and dark.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El amigo de un médico de urgencias llega al hospital combativo y descontrolado, atacando al médico ya los demás en urgencias; la garganta de un ciclista se abre cuando un conductor abre la puerta de un automóvil en su camino.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Dos pacientes tienen extrañas lesiones de pesca; un instructor de artes marciales sufre dolores abdominales; cuando las víctimas adolescentes de un accidente automovilístico llenan su pequeña sala de emergencias, un médico debe tomar decisiones críticas.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un soldado llega a la sala de emergencias con una puñalada y una mujer toma una sobredosis de píldoras de dieta.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre con picazón por la exposición al roble venenoso resulta que también tiene gusanos excavando en una herida en su espalda; una mujer joven tiene un labio sangrante.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre con una lesión en la mano se desmaya por un dolor abdominal, las pruebas conducen a un descubrimiento impactante; la hija separada de un paciente ayuda a resolver el misterio de sus síntomas mortales.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Dos pacientes ingresan en la sala de emergencias, ambos experimentan convulsiones; el pulmón de un anciano se derrumba, y su joven esposa y su hija pelean por él.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un médico de emergencias fuera de servicio diagnostica su propia enfermedad crítica mientras se dirige al hospital.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una boa constrictora viva envuelta alrededor del brazo de un hombre le está mordiendo la muñeca y no la suelta; una mujer joven tiene un brazo muy cortado.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un cirujano requiere tratamiento urgente tras caer de una cama al tratar de ayudar a su paciente; un hombre que llega con la muñeca cortada revela un secreto sorprendente.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre que ha sido destrozado por un contenedor de basura apenas se aferra a la vida; Al mismo tiempo, una monja anciana y una prostituta ebria y gritando entran a la sala de emergencias.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un médico de un resort debe tratar a un hombre gravemente herido por la hélice de un barco; y la sala de emergencias se detiene cuando las computadoras y la enfermera jefe no funcionan.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Rex (Neil Roberts) gets Prue (Shannen Doherty) a locket that harbors the evil warlock Matthew (guest star Matthew Tate), Matthew takes Prue’s powers and sets out for the other sisters.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Rex (guest star Neil Roberts) and Hannah (guest star Leigh- Allyn Baker) set out to destroy the sisters Halliwell and frame Prue (Shannen Doherty) for murder while angering her by Rex dating Phoebe (Alyssa Milano).

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Phoebe’s old flame Clay comes to town after he and his partners steal a valuable urn that is guarded by a demon, putting Prue in jeopardy after Clay gets Phoebe to ask Prue to help sell the urn.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Piper is almost killed by a beast, she notices a strange transformation she begins to make – all similar traits to her attacker. Meanwhile, Phoebe works as Prue’s assistant and tries to help a family reunite after a premonition.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Prue (Shannen Doherty) tries to help a young boy (guest star David Netter), who’s received his mother’s witch powers after two thugs (guest stars Brad Tatum and Will Stewart) kidnap him to use his powers for their evil gain.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: An earthquake unearths a shadowy evil Woogy who promptly takes over the gasman on the Halliwell premises who promptly takes over Phoebe, who as a child most feared the Woogyman the girls’ grandma always talked about.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: A dangerous mortal (guest star Alex McArthur) uses a crystal sword to suck powers out of people and targets Prue (Shannen Doherty) as his next victim. To help combat him, Prue casts a spell to strengthen her powers, only it ends up cloning her twice.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After a run in with a demon who’s responsible for the death of the sisters’ mother, Prue, Piper and Phoebe are transported back to the 1970’s after casting a spell to try to prevent her death and their loss of powers.

programme.desc: Bernardo Elizondo, un hacendado mayor y adinerado, se enamora de Libia, una joven humilde que enfrenta la furia de sus hermanos porque ella es vista como una prostituta por la gente del pueblo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan quiere marcharse lejos con sus hermanos para que Libia se olvide de ese amor, pero una verdad golpea el honor de la familia Reyes, mientras Bernardo esconde que es un hombre casado.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Al enterarse de la muerte y el engaño de Elizondo, Libia va a la hacienda, se siente desamparada y no aguanta más al ser fuertemente humillada por Gabriela, la viuda de Bernardo, y sus hijas.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan, Óscar y Franco reconocen el cadáver de su hermana y acusan al hacendado como el asesino. Norma Elizondo se opone a las decisiones de su madre y desafía los deseos de su esposo Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los Reyes consiguen la dirección de la hacienda de los Elizondo y van a reclamar justicia. Gabriela se siente agobiada y toma vacaciones en su casa de la Florida, viaja con Norma y Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena y Sara Elizondo están cautivadas con los empleados que recibe Eva en la hacienda. Juan pelea con Franco por culpa de Rosario, la cantante del bar, y por oponerse a su venganza.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar propone una manera de desquitarse de los Elizondo sin mancharse las manos de sangre. Gabriela regresa sin avisar y entrevista a los trabajadores, Juan no puede ocultar su rabia y dolor.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams dressed as kangaroos continue through Australia where one Racer reverts to old habits as tempers start to flare, and another Team breaks down in tears from utter exhaustion.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While in Japan, one team's hopes are shattered after a car crash jolts them to the back of the pack, and Racers get down and dirty in a pile of frigid mud.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The nine remaining teams depart from Commodore Perry's Landing in Kurihama, Japan and travel to their next destination in a race around the world for one million dollars.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The pressure builds when a prehistoric Roadblock pushes one Racer over the edge and a Double U-turn causes panic among the teams as they race to avoid elimination.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Overwhelmed by a swarming sea of people on the congested streets of India, one team narrowly dodges a traffic collision while another's clumsiness threatens to spoil their chances of acing the Detour.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Overwhelmed by the crowded streets of India, one team makes a costly blunder while another Racer takes a desperate plunge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Confronted by a psychological Detour, teams try to avoid making a Freudian slip in the slick streets of Austria, and a hefty meal proves to be too big for some teams' stomachs.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The stress of the Race begins to take its toll when a Double U-Turn is revealed, and one Team struggles to consume a local delicacy while others become acquainted with Swiss hospitality.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams brave bone-chilling temperatures as they come face-to-face with the world famous Matterhorn, and tempers flare in the most intense argument of the season.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four Teams mix it up in Brazil where Racers cry out in pain during a hairy situation as this season comes down to a race to the finish line when one Team will be crowned the winners and receive the 1 million dollar prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Emmy Award-winning The Amazing Race sets off for a new global adventure as Teams depart for Taipei, Taiwan. Plus, one team's position in the game is put in serious jeopardy when they lose their passport less than an hour into the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: When Racers discover that for the first time in THE AMAZING RACE history there is a double elimination, they are forced to step up their game. However, costly mistakes jeopardize multiple teams' chances at staying in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One Team is stranded in Indonesia as they watch their competition race by, and two Teams join forces to push through a mind-numbing mental challenge.

programme.desc: After an amazing helicopter trip to the remote location, Jack goes behind-the-scenes at a trout hatchery. Then he and Sue exchange practical jokes while fly-fishing along the Sun River.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along for an epic adventure to the tropical Caribbean Island of Curacao! Join Jungle Jack as he braves a deep diving Submarine, encounters Dolphins on the high seas, and rolls up his sleeves for Coral Reef Conservation.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Get a glimpse of Jack in his own backyard on this trip to Bigfork, Montana. And, Jack and Sue visit Triple D Game Ranch to get an up-close look at bears, wolves, and even an elusive cougar.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his family as they trek deep into the jungles of Rwanda and get a close-up look at wild, and extremely endangered, mountain gorillas.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to the island-nation of Curacao for some quality time with its winged residents. From fearless flying Bats, and powerful Ostrich to pretty-in-pink Flamingos.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Dirty Half-Dozen
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he uncovers some of the earthiest creatures in the world. Mud-loving elephants, nesting gators, burrowing penguins, sand-dwelling bee-eaters and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack in a place near and dear to his heart, Rwanda's Akagera National Park, where he finds new hope for wildlife after years of turmoil. Then Jack gets up close and personal with the biggest wild elephant he's ever seen in his life!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Life in the Slow Lane
programme.desc: Today’s countdown is all about animals that know how to take it easy, from mellow mammals like manatees and koalas to relaxed reptiles like the giant Galapagos tortoise. Kick back, relax and take a ride in the slow lane!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi discover beekeepers working to protect the forest, and Jack meets the sacred cows of Rwanda.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue head into the state-of-the-art Animal Care Center at Busch Gardens Tampa Bay to assist veterinarians performing an exam on a lion!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack visits the world's largest crocodile farm and assists in the capture of a 14-foot reptilian destined for a Thailand education center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack travels to the Florida Keys to return twin orphaned Manatees back to the wild, before visiting the Dolphin Research Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Tall Tails
programme.desc: If you’ve ever wondered why animals have tails, join Jungle Jack for today’s tales about tails! Some tails are dangerous, some are powerful, and some are critical for high-speed navigation. Dolphins, ccorpions, crocs, lemurs and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack joins in on a mission to save an Elephant caught in a deadly snare, before getting a glimpse of life on the savannah for Lions and Leopards.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he hits the road in search of amazing animal adventures. Elephant seals with their own freeway exit, a drive to the end of the Earth for dolphins, a Thai elephant expressway, and more epic road trips!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is traveling across the globe to bring you his favorite zoo adventures! From Asia's Singapore Zoo to Healesville in Australia, Calgary Zoo in Canada, and Jack's home, see what it's like behind the scenes at some of the world's coolest zoos.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Snakes Alive
programme.desc: Jack is counting down his scaliest, slitheriest, snakiest safaris ever. From green anacondas and cobras to eastern diamondbacks, puff adders, taipans and more… this Wild Countdown has teeth!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he heads to the Umfolozi Big 5 Game Reserve in South Africa for amazing animal encounters.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jack of All Trades
programme.desc: Caring for animals can be a big job! Join Jack for some on-the-job-training as he explores six incredible, dangerous and dirty animal jobs, like wrangling crocodiles, caring for elephants, herding cattle and a whole lot more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: A Nose Knows
programme.desc: Feeling nosey? Today’s Countdown has got you covered with some of the most notorious noses in the animal kingdom. Seven remarkable stories of creatures that use their noses to flirt, fight and even shower!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack for some of his scariest animal encounters with Lions, Crocodiles, Snakes, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: In Africa, the Lion is king! This is the only place on the planet where white lions roam free. Join Jack as he searches for Big Cats and Big Adventure in the unique arid landscape of Sanbona!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for six of his all-time scariest safaris. Come along as he comes face-to-face with Alligators, Lions, Elephants, Cheetah, Tigers and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: How in the world do bats find their way in the dark? How do caterpillars turn into butterflies? How long can tortoises really live? The world has questions, and Jungle Jack has answers on today’s Wild Countdown!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack takes off on a very special egg hunt, looking for creatures big and small that hatch from eggs! Crocodiles, bald eagles, sea turtles, ostriches, penguins, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets record-breakers in the animal kingdom like the fastest feline, the animal with the strongest jaws, the world's loudest species, and lots of other chart-topping creatures.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he heads to Pigeon Forge, Tennessee for an All-American Bald Eagle adventure with the American Eagle Foundation at Dollywood!

programme.title: Jamie & Jimmy's Food Fight Club
programme.desc: Childhood friends Jamie Oliver and Jimmy Doherty present a selection of feasts for the weekend.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie makes a classic British picnic including sausage rolls, mackerel pâté, lovely asparagus, crunchy salad, and Pimm's Eton mess.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie cooks grilled sardines with crispy halloumi, watercress salad and figs, and thick chocolate mousse.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie prepares steak Indian-style, with spinach and paneer salad, naan breads, and a mango dessert.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Tasty crusted cod with `my mashy peas', tartar sauce and warm garden salad.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Chicken skewers with satay sauce; a fiery noodle salad; fruit and mint sugar.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Broccoli orecchiette with courgette and bocconcini salad; prochiutto and melon salad.

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: Jamie's mother-in-law and chums couldn't get tickets to the men's final.

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a farewell feast.

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: Jamie creates a menu for a friend's wedding.

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: Jamie cooks dinner for vendors at Borough Market.

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: Jamie's organizes a reunion for friends he hasn't seen since high school; beer flows alongside a variety of finger foods.

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: After preparing breakfast cosisting of yogurt, chilli scrambled egg wrap, and bloody mary, Jamie and his mates gather around the TV to watch England play in World Cup 2002.

programme.title: Save With Jamie
programme.desc: Chef Jamie Oliver roasts a shoulder of lamb and uses the leftovers for Moroccan-style pastillas.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie cooks up a big, bold sausage casserole, packed full of flavor -it's a new family favorite in the Oliver house, then he shows us the most beautifully brilliant way to dress an aubergine salad, served with the quickest homemade flat breads.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie gives traditional roast chicken a French twist; shows new ways to use up stale bread; and cooks up his take on a creamy prawn linguine for his friend and mentor Gennaro Contaldo.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie reinvents a roast chicken by combining it with the flavors of a Margherita pizza-basil, tomato and mozzarella -to create a glorious new family favorite, then whips up his Prawn toast toasties, the perfect snack for sharing.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie rustles up his restaurant-quality avocado hollandaise and then he gets his son Buddy involved in cooking a different pizza for all the family to enjoy.

programme.title: Jamie's Chef
programme.desc: The graduates prepare their pitches for the Trustees of the Fifteen Foundation.

programme.title: Jamie's Chef

programme.title: Jamie's Chef

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On
programme.desc: Jamie shows how to make a vegetarian chilli and pasta with three easy sauces, homemade tagliatelle, a cheat's carbonara, and a simple tomato sauce.

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver makes a risotto, a seven-veggie sauce, and an egg-free chocolate cake, proving that it is not difficult to create great dishes from the simplest ingredients.

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates some recipes, tips and hacks tailored for the unique times, including pork stir-fry, steamed dumplings, and best friend Jimmy Doherty's ultimate roast beef sarnie.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A jilted fiance hires a Mata Hari (Elaine Joyce) to find the crew member that ruined his wedding plans; a junior executive (Parker Stevenson) suffers in silence while his boss (David Doyle) lusts after his bride.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A married couple finds out that their daughter is in love with the father's best friend, while a progressive woman agrees to help her romantic partner have an affair.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When an organization wants to give a crew member an award, Captain Stubing suggests Isaac. Meanwhile, a fun-loving guy tries to help out his heartbroken friend but finds himself in trouble after meeting an unusual woman.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The professional escort of an older woman (Vera Miles) dallies with a young woman (Constance Forslund); an advertising whiz tries to impress his best client despite putdowns from her daughter.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An estranged mother and daughter mend their relationship after a secret about their past is revealed. Then, an attractive widow finds herself falling for a burly crew member.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An author (Tom Poston) is blackmailed by his secretary; a father and son (Geoffrey Scott, Clark Brandon) unwittingly fall for the same woman (Markie Post).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An Army captain (Beth Howland) sets her sights on Gopher; a married couple (Charlotte Rae, Louis Nye) meet up with two swingers (Jamie Farr, Heather Locklear).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Everyone is a suspect when a passenger goes missing about the Pacific Princess. Meanwhile, when Julie's high-school friend boards the ship with her son, they learn an important lesson after running into the woman's father and another passenger.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A carnival entrepreneur is approached on the Pacific Princess by a woman who knows a shocking secret about his past. Meanwhile, a comedy duo with a bear act competes for the affection of the same woman.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: On a Hong Kong cruise: a senator romances a woman until he learns the nature of her visit; two brothers date Julie and Vicki; a compulsive shopper is offered $25,000 by her husband (Herb Edelman) if she'll resist temptation during the trip.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An international fugitive finds love when he meets a beautiful woman with a secret, while a divorcee meets an intriguing man who conceals his identity from her and Isaac.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A rich widow comes face to face with her estranged sister, who's working on the ship as a made and whose boyfriend the wealthy woman stole and married 40 years earlier. Meanwhile, a childless couple hatches a plan to become parents.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A man bound by alimony wants to make sure his ex (Michelle Phillips) goes through with her marriage; Julie's Aunt Sylvia and her pal Betsy try to interest a publisher in Betsy's memoirs.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Entomology: Bugs have roamed the earth for 250 million years, but their intimate association with death is just now coming to life.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson Investigation: Insurance torchings, mob burnouts and arson murders: these crimes are designed to take all clues with them. But a solid case can be built from a heap of ashes.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which as mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid the box exploded killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. They're the most dangerous creatures in the world: smart assassins. And they usually don't stop at one kill.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder, at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their undoing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When victims of murder know their killers, they are often caught off guard. But even the best-laid plans leave traces of the forsaken trust.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Argentine family moves to North Fork. The townspeople are unfriendly to them, making fun of their clothing and customs. The Argentinean adult immigrant is openly hostile in return.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After the end of the Civil War, General Phil Sheridan, who has been appointed Governor of the New Mexico Territory, is on an inspection tour of the country.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas McCain's, a traveling photographer, comes to North Fork plying his trade. When a murder is committed, the photographer is accused of the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas welcomes his old friend Tom Birch, who once saved his life, unaware that the man is now a bank robber on the run with his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury, released from Yuma prison, arrives in North Fork intent on getting even with Marshal Torrance, who helped send him to jail.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas comes to the rescue when escaped convicts hold up the general store in North Fork and take Marshall Torrance hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark manages to capture a hawk but falls into danger with a rattlesnake. A stranger comes to his rescue and Mark invites the man home, unaware that he is on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas takes in an orphaned teen being raised by his abusive uncle after there is trouble at the school.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The McCains try to be tolerant of their embittered neighbor Abel MacDonald, but they decide he's gone too far when he won't allow his injured boy to get medical treatment.
